case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. DERIK DULIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY REPRESENTATIVE FOR THE PLAINTIFF, CCSF. APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT.CLERK: S. VANTREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506)
